name: Abbreviated Damage Control with Temporary Closure
description: Short initial laparotomy for haemorrhage and contamination control with planned deferred reconstruction.

name: Damage Control with Packing and Planned Relook
description: Damage-control procedure using packing and temporary closure with mandatory second-look surgery.

name: Standard Temporary Abdominal Closure NPWT
description: Open abdomen management using negative pressure temporary abdominal closure.

name: NPWT with Fascial Traction
description: Negative pressure therapy combined with fascial traction to support delayed primary fascial closure.

name: Planned Second-Look for Source Control
description: Planned return to theatre to reassess contamination control, bowel viability, or washout requirements.

name: Relook for Anastomosis or Perfusion Assessment
description: Repeat laparotomy to reassess viability, anastomosis integrity, or need for further resection.

name: Limited Debridement
description: Targeted debridement of localized infected or necrotic abdominal wall tissue.

name: Radical Debridement
description: Extensive debridement for necrotizing or widespread abdominal wall infection.

name: Conversion to Gastric Bypass
description: Revision of prior bariatric procedure to gastric bypass pathway.

name: Sleeve Revision or Re-Sleeve
description: Revisional sleeve-based metabolic surgery pathway.

name: Standard One-Anastomosis Gastric Bypass
description: Single-anastomosis gastric bypass / mini gastric bypass standard profile.

name: Revisional One-Anastomosis Gastric Bypass
description: One-anastomosis gastric bypass performed as conversion from prior bariatric procedure.

name: Standard Roux-en-Y Gastric Bypass
description: Primary Roux-en-Y gastric bypass with gastric pouch and alimentary limb construction.

name: Banded Roux-en-Y Gastric Bypass Profile
description: Roux-en-Y gastric bypass pathway using additional outlet restriction in selected bariatric practice.

name: Standard Sleeve Gastrectomy
description: Primary longitudinal sleeve gastrectomy for metabolic surgery.

name: Sleeve Gastrectomy with Hiatal Repair
description: Sleeve gastrectomy combined with hiatus hernia repair.

name: Level I-II Axillary Clearance
description: Standard axillary node dissection involving level I and II lymph nodes.

name: Level I-III Axillary Clearance
description: Extended axillary node clearance including level III disease when indicated.

name: Dual-Tracer Sentinel Node Biopsy
description: Sentinel node biopsy using combined radioisotope and blue dye mapping.

name: Single-Tracer Sentinel Node Biopsy
description: Sentinel node biopsy using a single localization tracer pathway.

name: Ultrasound-Localized Cyst Excision
description: Open breast cyst excision with preoperative or intraoperative ultrasound localization.

name: Open Excision of Symptomatic Cyst
description: Direct excision of symptomatic or recurrent breast cyst.

name: Simple or Total Mastectomy
description: Complete breast tissue removal without skin or nipple preservation profile.

name: Skin-Sparing Mastectomy
description: Mastectomy preserving most of the skin envelope for reconstruction planning.

name: Nipple-Sparing Mastectomy
description: Mastectomy preserving skin envelope and nipple-areolar complex in selected cases.

name: Localized Wide Local Excision
description: Breast-conserving excision using lesion localization such as wire or seed guidance.

name: Oncoplastic Wide Local Excision
description: Breast-conserving excision combined with oncoplastic reshaping techniques.

name: Simple Low Fistulotomy
description: Fistulotomy for low intersphincteric or low transsphincteric fistula.

name: Staged Fistulotomy
description: Fistulotomy completed in stages where sphincter preservation is needed.

name: Open Haemorrhoidectomy
description: Open excisional haemorrhoidectomy technique.

name: Closed Haemorrhoidectomy
description: Closed excisional haemorrhoidectomy with wound closure.

name: Open Lateral Internal Sphincterotomy
description: Open division of the internal sphincter for chronic fissure.

name: Closed Lateral Internal Sphincterotomy
description: Subcutaneous closed sphincterotomy for chronic fissure.

name: Loose Draining Seton
description: Loose seton placed to maintain drainage in fistula-in-ano.

name: Cutting Seton
description: Seton placed with gradual tightening in selected fistula management pathways.

name: Open Hartmann's Procedure
description: Open colon resection with end colostomy and rectal stump.

name: Laparoscopic Hartmann's Procedure
description: Minimally invasive Hartmann's procedure in selected cases.

name: Laparoscopic Left Hemicolectomy
description: Minimally invasive left colon resection.

name: Open Left Hemicolectomy
description: Open left colon resection for advanced disease or hostile abdomen.

name: Laparoscopic Right Hemicolectomy
description: Minimally invasive right colon resection.

name: Open Right Hemicolectomy
description: Open right colon resection for advanced disease or technical complexity.

name: Laparoscopic Sigmoid Colectomy
description: Minimally invasive sigmoid colectomy.

name: Open Sigmoid Colectomy
description: Open sigmoid colectomy for complicated disease or conversion cases.

name: Subtotal Colectomy with Ileostomy
description: Near-total colectomy with end or loop ileostomy where restoration is deferred.

name: Subtotal Colectomy with Ileorectal Anastomosis
description: Near-total colectomy with immediate ileorectal continuity restoration.

name: Total Colectomy with Ileorectal Anastomosis
description: Complete colectomy with preservation of rectum and ileorectal reconstruction.

name: Total Proctocolectomy Profile
description: Total colectomy performed in a pathway anticipating or incorporating end ileostomy / pouch-related reconstruction planning.

name: Standard Abdominoperineal Resection
description: Conventional abdominoperineal resection with permanent end colostomy.

name: Extralevator Abdominoperineal Excision
description: Extended cylindrical perineal excision for low rectal cancer.

name: Laparoscopic Anterior Resection
description: Minimally invasive anterior resection of rectosigmoid or upper rectum.

name: Open Anterior Resection
description: Open anterior resection for advanced or technically demanding cases.

name: Low Anterior Resection with Diverting Ileostomy
description: Low rectal resection with restorative anastomosis and protective ileostomy.

name: Robotic or Minimally Invasive Low Anterior Resection
description: Minimally invasive low rectal resection for pelvic dissection and restorative reconstruction.

name: Trephine Loop Ileostomy
description: Loop ileostomy created through trephine approach without formal laparotomy.

name: Laparoscopic-Assisted Loop Ileostomy
description: Minimally invasive stoma formation with laparoscopic assistance.

name: Stapled Ileostomy Closure
description: Ileostomy reversal using stapled bowel anastomosis.

name: Hand-Sewn Ileostomy Closure
description: Ileostomy reversal using hand-sewn bowel anastomosis.

name: Image-Guided Percutaneous Drainage
description: Percutaneous drainage performed with radiologic guidance for localized intra-abdominal collections.

name: Laparoscopic Abscess Drainage
description: Minimally invasive operative drainage and washout of intra-abdominal abscess.

name: Open Operative Drainage
description: Open surgical drainage used for complex multiloculated abscess or failed percutaneous management.

name: Exploratory Source-Control Laparotomy
description: Emergency exploratory laparotomy focused on perforation, sepsis, or uncontrolled contamination.

name: Ischaemia or Haemorrhage Laparotomy
description: Emergency laparotomy focused on mesenteric ischaemia, bleeding, or abdominal catastrophe requiring rapid exploration.

name: Laparoscopic Appendicectomy
description: Minimally invasive appendicectomy using laparoscopic access.

name: Open Appendicectomy
description: Open appendicectomy used for perforation, complex sepsis, or conversion cases.

name: Open Graham Patch Repair
description: Open omental patch repair for perforated duodenal ulcer.

name: Laparoscopic Graham Patch Repair
description: Laparoscopic omental patch repair for perforated duodenal ulcer in stable patients.

name: Laparoscopic Adhesiolysis
description: Laparoscopic division of obstructing adhesions in selected adhesive small bowel obstruction.

name: Open Adhesiolysis
description: Open adhesiolysis for dense adhesions, compromised bowel, or unclear anatomy.

name: Resection with Primary Anastomosis
description: Segmental small bowel resection followed by immediate anastomosis.

name: Resection with Stoma or Exteriorization
description: Small bowel resection with diversion or exteriorization where contamination or instability limits primary anastomosis.

name: Laparoscopic Transabdominal Adrenalectomy
description: Standard minimally invasive adrenalectomy via transabdominal route.

name: Posterior Retroperitoneoscopic Adrenalectomy
description: Adrenalectomy performed through posterior retroperitoneoscopic approach.

name: Open Adrenalectomy
description: Open adrenalectomy for large, invasive, or complex adrenal masses.

name: Focused Minimally Invasive Parathyroidectomy
description: Targeted excision of localized hyperfunctioning gland.

name: Four-Gland Exploration Parathyroidectomy
description: Bilateral neck exploration for multigland parathyroid disease.

name: Unilateral Lobectomy with Isthmusectomy
description: Removal of a single thyroid lobe with isthmus.

name: Minimally Invasive Hemithyroidectomy Profile
description: Smaller-incision hemithyroidectomy pathway in selected patients.

name: Total Thyroidectomy
description: Complete thyroid gland removal.

name: Completion Thyroidectomy
description: Completion removal of residual thyroid tissue following prior partial surgery.

name: Transcystic Bile Duct Exploration
description: Common bile duct exploration via the cystic duct.

name: Choledochotomy Exploration
description: Direct bile duct exploration through choledochotomy.

name: Roux-en-Y Hepaticojejunostomy
description: Standard biliary-enteric reconstruction using Roux-en-Y limb.

name: Complex or Revisional Hepaticojejunostomy
description: Reconstructive hepaticojejunostomy for complex bile duct injury or stricture.

name: Standard Laparoscopic Cholecystectomy
description: Routine minimally invasive gallbladder removal.

name: Open Cholecystectomy
description: Open gallbladder removal for difficult or converted cases.

name: Subtotal Cholecystectomy
description: Bail-out partial gallbladder excision in difficult gallbladder surgery.

name: Open Left Hepatectomy
description: Open left liver resection for major hepatectomy cases.

name: Minimally Invasive Left Hepatectomy
description: Selected minimally invasive left hepatectomy pathway.

name: Open Right Hepatectomy
description: Open right liver resection for major hepatectomy cases.

name: Minimally Invasive Right Hepatectomy
description: Selected minimally invasive major liver resection pathway.

name: Open Anatomical Segmentectomy
description: Open anatomical liver segmentectomy.

name: Minimally Invasive Segmentectomy
description: Laparoscopic or robotic liver segmentectomy.

name: Open Wedge Liver Resection
description: Open non-anatomical wedge excision of liver tissue.

name: Laparoscopic Wedge Liver Resection
description: Minimally invasive wedge liver resection for peripheral lesions.

name: Distal Pancreatectomy with Splenectomy
description: Distal pancreas resection with en bloc splenectomy.

name: Spleen-Preserving Distal Pancreatectomy
description: Distal pancreas resection preserving splenic vessels or spleen.

name: Classic Whipple Procedure
description: Pancreaticoduodenectomy including distal gastrectomy.

name: Pylorus-Preserving Pancreaticoduodenectomy
description: Pancreatic head resection preserving pylorus.

name: Primary Suture Epigastric Repair
description: Suture repair of small epigastric defect.

name: Mesh Epigastric Hernia Repair
description: Epigastric hernia repair using mesh reinforcement.

name: Open Retromuscular Mesh Repair
description: Open abdominal wall reconstruction with retromuscular mesh placement.

name: Laparoscopic IPOM Repair
description: Intraperitoneal onlay mesh repair using minimally invasive access.

name: Component Separation Reconstruction
description: Complex abdominal wall reconstruction with fascial release.

name: Sugarbaker Parastomal Repair
description: Parastomal hernia repair using lateralized bowel and mesh coverage.

name: Keyhole Parastomal Repair
description: Parastomal repair with keyhole mesh configuration around the stoma.

name: Open Ventral Retromuscular Repair
description: Open ventral hernia repair with retromuscular mesh plane.

name: Laparoscopic IPOM Ventral Repair
description: Laparoscopic ventral hernia repair using intraperitoneal mesh.

name: Robotic Ventral Hernia Repair
description: Robotic abdominal wall reconstruction or mesh repair pathway.

name: Primary Suture Diaphragmatic Repair
description: Direct diaphragmatic defect closure with sutures.

name: Mesh-Reinforced Diaphragmatic Repair
description: Diaphragmatic repair requiring prosthetic reinforcement.

name: Open Femoral Hernia Repair
description: Open femoral hernia repair, often via groin approach.

name: Laparoscopic Preperitoneal Femoral Repair
description: Minimally invasive femoral hernia repair in preperitoneal plane.

name: Open Mesh Inguinal Repair
description: Open tension-free anterior mesh repair.

name: Laparoscopic TEP Repair
description: Totally extraperitoneal minimally invasive inguinal repair.

name: Laparoscopic TAPP Repair
description: Transabdominal preperitoneal inguinal hernia repair.

name: Primary Suture Umbilical Repair
description: Suture closure of small umbilical hernia defect.

name: Mesh Umbilical Hernia Repair
description: Umbilical repair reinforced with prosthetic mesh.

name: Standard Segmental Oncological Colectomy
description: Cancer-directed colon resection with lymphovascular pedicle control.

name: Extended Oncological Colectomy
description: Extended colon resection for advanced or locally invasive malignancy.

name: Minor Oncological Liver Resection
description: Oncological liver resection involving wedge or segmental removal.

name: Major Oncological Hepatectomy
description: Oncological major hepatectomy for primary or secondary liver malignancy.

name: Distal Oncological Pancreatectomy
description: Cancer-directed distal pancreas resection.

name: Pancreaticoduodenectomy Oncology Profile
description: Cancer-directed pancreatic head resection pathway.

name: Cytoreductive Surgery with HIPEC
description: Peritoneal cytoreduction combined with hyperthermic intraperitoneal chemotherapy pathway.

name: Cytoreductive Surgery without HIPEC
description: Tumour debulking cytoreduction without intraperitoneal chemotherapy delivery.

name: Limited Peritoneal Debulking
description: Selective debulking of localized peritoneal disease.

name: Extensive Multiquadrant Debulking
description: Major peritoneal tumour debulking across multiple abdominal quadrants.

name: Subtotal Oncological Gastrectomy
description: Cancer-directed distal or partial gastrectomy.

name: Total Oncological Gastrectomy
description: Cancer-directed total gastrectomy with lymphadenectomy.

name: Deceased Donor Liver Transplant
description: Orthotopic liver transplantation using deceased donor graft.

name: Living Donor Liver Transplant
description: Liver transplantation using a living donor graft segment.

name: Simultaneous Pancreas-Kidney Profile
description: Pancreas transplantation performed in a combined pancreas-kidney pathway.

name: Pancreas-After-Kidney / Solitary Pancreas Profile
description: Pancreas transplant pathway following prior kidney transplant or as solitary pancreas graft.

name: Isolated Intestinal Transplant
description: Transplantation of donor small bowel alone.

name: Multivisceral Intestinal Transplant Profile
description: Intestinal transplant pathway involving combined abdominal visceral grafts.

name: Posterior Cruroplasty Repair
description: Hiatus hernia repair with posterior crural approximation, often with fundoplication.

name: Mesh-Reinforced Hiatus Repair
description: Large hiatus hernia repair with reinforcement of crural repair.

name: Nissen Fundoplication
description: Complete 360-degree fundoplication for reflux disease.

name: Toupet Fundoplication
description: Posterior 270-degree fundoplication where partial wrap is preferred.

name: Ivor Lewis Oesophagectomy
description: Two-stage transthoracic oesophagectomy with intrathoracic anastomosis.

name: McKeown Oesophagectomy
description: Three-stage oesophagectomy with cervical anastomosis.

name: Transhiatal Oesophagectomy
description: Oesophagectomy performed without thoracotomy in selected cases.

name: Open Gastrojejunostomy
description: Open bypass anastomosis between stomach and jejunum.

name: Laparoscopic Gastrojejunostomy
description: Minimally invasive gastrojejunostomy creation.

name: Distal Subtotal Gastrectomy
description: Distal gastric resection with reconstruction.

name: Open Partial Gastrectomy
description: Open partial gastric resection for benign or malignant disease.

name: Open Total Gastrectomy
description: Open total gastrectomy with lymphadenectomy and oesophagojejunal reconstruction.

name: Minimally Invasive Total Gastrectomy
description: Laparoscopic or robotic-assisted total gastrectomy pathway.
